title: Heavy rain warning for Dhaka — roads may flood by evening
body: The Bangladesh Meteorological Department has issued a heavy rainfall warning for Dhaka and Chittagong divisions. Residents are advised to avoid low-lying areas after 5pm.

title: 5-minute khichuri hack — perfect for rainy days
body: Short on time? This quick lentil khichuri takes only 5 minutes in a pressure cooker. Add a fried egg and a squeeze of lime — done.

title: Sabrina posted: 'Finally got my SSC results!'
body: Congratulations to all SSC passers this year! Share your results and tag your study group.

title: Pohela Boishakh at Ramna — free entry, starts at dawn
body: The annual Pahela Baishakh celebration at Ramna Batamul begins April 14th at 6am. Dress in white and red — thousands expected to attend.

title: Tigers beat India in last-over thriller — Shakib takes 5 wickets
body: Bangladesh wins the T20 series against India in a nail-biting final over. Next match vs. Pakistan on Saturday — don't miss it.

title: How to make perfect shorshe ilish at home
body: The secret to great hilsa curry is freshly ground yellow mustard and Padma fish. Step-by-step guide — ready in 25 minutes.

title: Rahim vai: 'Mirpur Road traffic is absolutely insane today'
body: Dhaka traffic alert: Mirpur–Farmgate corridor reporting 45-minute delays. Try alternate routes via Mohammadpur or use Pathao.

title: Ekushey Book Fair 2026 — Bangla Academy, Feb 1–28
body: The 50th Ekushey Book Fair opens February 1st. Over 700 stalls, live author readings, and new releases. Entry free every day.

title: Eid ul-Adha: 4-day holiday announced, offices close June 6–9
body: The government has confirmed a 4-day public holiday for Eid ul-Adha. Banks, schools, and government offices will be closed June 6–9.

title: Ramadan special: Restaurant-style shahi halim in 3 steps
body: Use mixed lentils, slow-cooked beef, and a handful of whole spices. This recipe feeds 6 and stores well for sehri too.

title: Nadia posted: 'First day at my new office in Gulshan!'
body: Starting a new chapter in the big city. Dhaka's professional scene is growing fast — what was your most memorable first-day moment?

title: Cox's Bazar Festival: 3-day tourism event — book your hotel now
body: Bangladesh Tourism Board's annual Cox's Bazar Festival runs December 20–22. Beachside concerts, local food stalls, and surfing lessons. Hotels fill fast.
